explanation: Under the Gun (First to act) with 7-2? Easy fold. Don't even think about it.
On the Button! Everyone folded to you. Steal the blinds with this decent hand.
Small Blind. Worst position in the game. You act first post-flop. Fold trash.
Even in Early Position, Ace-King is a monster. Raise for value.
Button is powerful, but Queen-Two is unplayable garbage. Fold.
